{{Infobox artifact
| name = Emperor's crown (The Elder Empire: Shadow)
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Emperor]]'s crown serves as a primary symbol of imperial authority and rule. Unlike the imitation silver version used by a body double during a fraudulent coronation, the authentic crown is a powerful artifact. It has been utilized by [[the Emperor]] to exert mental influence over numerous [[Consultants]] on [[Gray Island]]. [[The crown]] is a significant object of political concern, as the prospect of a [[Great Elder]] seizing control of it represents a catastrophic scenario for the world.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Calder Marten]] was wearing [[the Emperor]]'s crown.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[The Emperor]]'s crown is being used to force [[Consultants]] to betray their cause.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Navigator]] wears [[the Emperor]]'s crown.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[The Emperor]]'s crown can control any loyal citizens of the Empire.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Consultants]] have no defense against [[the Emperor]]'s crown without [[Bastion's Veil]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Champions]] stripped [[Calder]]'s body of [[the Emperor]]'s crown.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
